mapper.select: SELECT title, writer, udate, image, CONTENT FROM BOARD WHERE bnum=#{num}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD VALUES(board_num_pk.NEXTVAL, #{category}, #{title}, #{writer}, sysdate, #{image, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD WHERE category=#{category}
AND
(title like '%'|| #{searchValue} ||'%')
(content like '%'|| #{searchValue} ||'%')
(title like '%'|| #{searchValue} ||'%' or content like '%'|| #{searchValue} ||'%')
(writer like '%'|| #{searchValue} ||'%')
